questions.question: An ordering question asks you to sequence the ML lifecycle. Which order is correct?

answers.text: Frame problem -> collect data -> prepare data -> train -> evaluate -> deploy -> monitor
Train -> deploy -> collect data -> frame problem -> monitor
Deploy -> monitor -> train -> prepare data -> frame problem

questions.feedback: The lifecycle runs frame -> collect -> prepare -> train -> evaluate -> deploy -> monitor, then loops.

questions.question: A scenario says 'extract text and data from scanned invoices.' Which service is the fast keyword match?
questions.feedback: Textract extracts text and data from documents. Comprehend analyses text meaning; Polly is text-to-speech.

questions.question: Which are good AIF-C01 exam tactics?

answers.text: Answer every question, since blanks score as wrong
On matching questions, lock in the pairs you're sure of first
Prefer the simplest, most managed service that meets the need
Leave hard questions blank to avoid losing marks

questions.feedback: Answer everything, anchor the pairs you know, and favour the simplest managed fit. There's no penalty for guessing, so never leave a blank.
